title: senecio doronicum
intro: Senecio doronicum, also known as the tansy hawkweed, is a flowering plant species native to Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Senecio doronicum is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal purposes, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it due to potential toxicity.
